chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-242 0f 2022 Date Order with signature Of Judge For orders on office objections For hearing of main case 13.02.2024 Mr. Rehmat Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, AAG + # # * = ل 7 1 ٠ ٣٣ Case Of the petitioner Is that private Respondents have encroached upon graveyard namely Muqom Pir Hingoro Taluka Thari Mirwah District Khairpur Learned AAG undertakes that if private Respondents are found occupation of graveyard an action would be taken against in illegal would be evicted from the land of graveyard Let such them they compliance report be submitted within [w0 exercise be done months Petition is accordingly disposed of and and
